meta.description: Anime tracker: lists, episode progress, and how many hours your backlog actually takes.

home.emptyText: No metadata loaded yet. Run {command} — it pulls titles from Jikan into the database.

title.whereToWatchNote: Licensed services — dubs and quality live there, but they cannot be embedded here.
title.mayNotWork: MAY NOT WORK IN YOUR COUNTRY

myList.title: My list
myList.emptyText: Add titles with the “+ Add to list” button — they show up here, and whatever you are watching appears on the home page under “Continue watching”.

backlog.title: How much time I have
backlog.intro: A watchlist is hours, not rows. Here you see what it adds up to, and what you can realistically finish tonight.
backlog.whatFitsNote: Started titles come first — finishing beats starting something new.
backlog.nothingFits: Nothing in your list fits into {time}.
backlog.emptyText: Your list is empty, nothing to count.
backlog.estimatedHint: Duration unknown, using a typical value

auth.signInIntro: Needed to keep your watching and completed lists, and to pick up from the episode you stopped at.
auth.dataNote: We only receive your name, avatar and email. We never post on your behalf.
auth.agreeTo: By signing in you agree to the <link>privacy policy</link>.
auth.errorNotLinked: This email already signed in another way. Use the same service you used the first time.
auth.errorAccessDenied: Sign-in rejected. Your email may not be verified with the provider.
auth.errorVerification: The sign-in link expired. Please try again.
auth.errorGeneric: Could not sign in. Please try again.

footer.sources: Anime data comes from open sources: MyAnimeList, Shikimori, AniList. We do not host or serve any video.
